note: Working dataset for the app. General actions/reactions available to all characters, plus heroic-path talents (key talent + Investigator/Spy/Thief-style specialties for all 6 paths). 'eff' is terse shorthand in our own words. 'spec' = specialty within the path. act '?' = the source used an icon we couldn't read; treat as the stated count, else 1 action — verify against your book. 'tier' is 1 for all path talents (real gating is in 'pre' and the talent-tree order).

abilities.name: Strike
abilities.eff: unarmed/weapon atk vs Physical. Repeatable, but each uses a different hand; offhand costs 2F.

abilities.name: Move
abilities.eff: move up to movement rate; Slowed conditions reduce it. Repeatable.

abilities.name: Interact
abilities.eff: manipulate a nearby object (draw weapon, open door, grab item); no test. Repeatable.

abilities.name: Use a Skill
abilities.eff: roll a skill to handle a battlefield task (hide, search, treat).

abilities.name: Gain Advantage
abilities.eff: skill test vs foe defense; success -> advantage on next test vs that foe with a different skill.

abilities.name: Brace
abilities.eff: take cover within 5ft; attacks vs you get disadvantage until you move/attack.

abilities.name: Disengage
abilities.eff: move 5ft without triggering Reactive Strikes.

abilities.name: Grapple
abilities.eff: Athletics vs Physical; success -> target Restrained while in reach.

abilities.name: Shove
abilities.eff: Athletics vs Physical; success -> push/pull 5ft; ends a Grapple on you.

abilities.name: Recover
abilities.eff: roll recovery die to regain health/focus (as a short rest). Once per scene; can spend extra actions.

abilities.name: Ready
abilities.eff: pick a trigger + an action; use that action when the trigger fires before your next turn. Costs the action's cost +1a.

abilities.name: Banter
abilities.eff: speak briefly; nuanced/persuasive speech needs Use a Skill instead.

abilities.name: Drop
abilities.eff: drop held objects.

abilities.name: Aid
abilities.eff: trigger: ally about to test -> grant them an advantage.

abilities.name: Dodge
abilities.eff: trigger: an attack is aimed at you -> impose disadvantage on it. Not vs area/multi-target.

abilities.name: Avoid Danger
abilities.eff: trigger: imperiled by surroundings -> Agility test (DC = triggering result, else 15) to escape/mitigate.

abilities.name: Reactive Strike
abilities.eff: trigger: foe willingly steps out of your reach -> melee/unarmed atk vs Physical. Not vs instantaneous movement.

abilities.name: Opportunist
abilities.eff: 1x each round: re-roll one plot-die result.

abilities.name: Rousing Presence
abilities.eff: make an ally Determined.

abilities.name: Seek Quarry
abilities.eff: mark a target to pursue; gain an advantage against it.

abilities.name: Decisive Command
abilities.eff: give an ally a bonus d4 ('command die') applied to one roll.

abilities.name: Erudition
abilities.eff: gain bonus skill ranks you can reallocate.

abilities.name: Vigilant Stance
abilities.eff: adopt a defensive stance granting added responsiveness and flexibility.

abilities.name: Watchful Eye
abilities.eff: trigger: willing ally within 20ft rolls a plot die -> use Opportunist on their plot die

abilities.name: Get 'Em Talking
abilities.eff: 1F: Deduction vs spir of an influenceable foe; success -> learn their motivation; raise stakes on tests leveraging it this scene

abilities.name: Quick Analysis
abilities.eff: 2F -> gain an advantage, usable only on cognitive tests via Use a Skill / Gain Advantage / an Agent talent

abilities.name: Baleful
abilities.eff: passive: foes must spend extra focus = your tier to resist your influence

abilities.name: Gather Evidence
abilities.eff: passive: succeed on a cognitive test vs a character -> become Focused EONT; gain Legal Codes expertise

abilities.name: Hardy
abilities.eff: passive: +1 max health per level (retroactive)

abilities.name: Sleuth's Instincts
abilities.eff: passive: adv on cognitive tests vs foes whose motivation you know; you auto-know when they lie to you

abilities.name: Close the Case
abilities.eff: 1/scene, 3F: Deduction vs cog of an influenceable foe (adv if you know their motive); success -> they back down; fail -> they get adv vs you EONT

abilities.name: Sure Outcome
abilities.eff: when you use Opportunist, 2F to flip the plot die to a chosen result instead of rerolling

abilities.name: Plausible Excuse
abilities.eff: trigger: discovered while hiding/skulking -> 2F to feign innocence; all who sense you believe it; resisting costs them extra F = Deception ranks; gain Sleight of Hand expertise

abilities.name: Collected
abilities.eff: passive: +2 cog defense, +2 spir defense

abilities.name: Cover Story
abilities.eff: gain a false identity + a relevant cultural expertise

abilities.name: Subtle Takedown
abilities.eff: unarmed atk w/ Insight vs cog of a Surprised/unaware foe your size or smaller, raise stakes; hit -> can't communicate EONT; Opportunity -> auto-Grapple + Prone

abilities.name: Mighty
abilities.eff: passive: on weapon/unarmed hit, per action-die spent on that atk -> +(1 + tier) damage

abilities.name: Mercurial Facade
abilities.eff: disguise yourself via Deception, no supplies needed; first to see through it is Surprised EONT

abilities.name: High Society Contacts
abilities.eff: gain High Society expertise; 2F on a high-society social test -> add an Opportunity to result

abilities.name: Risky Behavior
abilities.eff: before a test, 1F to raise the stakes

abilities.name: Double Down
abilities.eff: after Opportunist, reroll the die once more (must keep it); a bad result costs 2 focus

abilities.name: Cheap Shot
abilities.eff: hand free + 1F: unarmed atk w/ Thievery vs cog of a foe your size or smaller, raise stakes; hit -> Stunned EONT; Opportunity -> steal a stowed item

abilities.name: Surefooted
abilities.eff: passive: +10ft movement; reduce falling/dangerous-terrain damage by 2x tier

abilities.name: Underworld Contacts
abilities.eff: gain Criminal Groups expertise; 2F on a social test vs criminals -> add an Opportunity to result

abilities.name: Shadow Step
abilities.eff: after Disengage, 2F: Thievery vs each sensing enemy's cog (adv in cover/obscured); beat one -> hidden from them as if you'd hidden via Stealth

abilities.name: Fast Talker
abilities.eff: 2F -> gain an advantage, usable only on spiritual tests via Use a Skill / Gain Advantage / an Agent talent

abilities.name: Trickster's Hand
abilities.eff: 2F -> gain an advantage, usable only on physical tests via Use a Skill / Gain Advantage / an Agent talent

abilities.name: Steadfast Challenge
abilities.eff: 1F: Discipline test vs spir of an influenceable foe; hit -> Disoriented + disadv on their tests vs you EONT

abilities.name: Collected
abilities.eff: passive: +2 cog defense, +2 spir defense

abilities.name: Withering Retort
abilities.eff: trigger: sensed foe atks you -> fire Steadfast Challenge as reaction; also +deflect vs that atk = Discipline ranks

abilities.name: Well Dressed
abilities.eff: gain Fashion expertise; in Presentable armor/fancy clothes -> adv on first Deception/Leadership/Persuasion test each scene

abilities.name: Calm Appeal
abilities.eff: when Steadfast Challenge Disorients a foe, 1F -> pacify them rest of scene (broken if attacked or ally hurt); resisting costs them extra F = Discipline ranks

abilities.name: High Society Contacts
abilities.eff: gain High Society expertise; 2F on a high-society social test -> add an Opportunity to result

abilities.name: Peaceful Solution
abilities.eff: if all non-minion foes pacified & others agree to stop -> end combat, becomes conversation; GM may allow non-combat use

abilities.name: Practiced Oratory
abilities.eff: when you use Rousing Presence/Steadfast Challenge, pay up to Persuasion ranks in F -> that many extra targets

abilities.name: Customary Garb
abilities.eff: passive: while in Presentable armor/station-appropriate clothes, +2 phys defense, +2 spir defense

abilities.name: Galvanize
abilities.eff: 1/scene: influenceable ally rolls recovery die, recovers that much F (no action for them)

abilities.name: Devoted Presence
abilities.eff: on Rousing Presence, 1F per target -> clear any of: Prone, Slowed, Stunned, Surprised from them

abilities.name: Composed
abilities.eff: passive: max & current F increase by tier; scales as tier rises

abilities.name: Stalwart Presence
abilities.eff: on Rousing Presence, 1F -> +2 to one chosen defense of target until end of next round

abilities.name: Applied Motivation
abilities.eff: passive: when you make a character recover F, they get bonus F = half Lore ranks (round up)

abilities.name: Sage Counsel
abilities.eff: after Aiding an ally, 1F -> also give them the Rousing Presence benefit (no action)

abilities.name: Inspired Zeal
abilities.eff: after a sensed ally spends Determined for an Opportunity, pick up to Discipline-ranks influenceable allies -> each recovers 1F

abilities.name: Sound Advice
abilities.eff: after an influenceable ally fails a skill test, 1F -> use Rousing Presence on them as a reaction

abilities.name: Practical Demonstration
abilities.eff: after you succeed on an atk or Gain Advantage test -> use Rousing Presence as a free reaction

abilities.name: Lessons in Patience
abilities.eff: gain Motivational Speech expertise; after using Rousing Presence, target recovers 1F

abilities.name: Mighty
abilities.eff: passive: on weapon/unarmed hit, per action-die spent on that atk -> +(1 + tier) damage

abilities.name: Instill Confidence
abilities.eff: Rousing Presence may instead make target Focused (not Determined) until scene ends

abilities.name: Guiding Oration
abilities.eff: after you succeed at Gain Advantage, pick an influenceable ally within 10ft of your target -> they get adv on next test vs that target EONT

abilities.name: Foresight
abilities.eff: passive: gain one extra action-die at combat start and again each turn after

abilities.name: Rallying Shout
abilities.eff: Rousing Presence may target a sensed Unconscious ally -> ends Unconscious; if at 0 health they roll recovery die + Leadership ranks as restored health

abilities.name: Tagging Shot
abilities.eff: step 5ft + ranged atk vs phys; hit or graze -> target becomes your Seek Quarry quarry

abilities.name: Combat Training
abilities.eff: gain weapon+armor+Military Life expertises; 1/round on a miss, graze a target w/o spending F

abilities.name: Sharp Eye
abilities.eff: observe quarry (or any char 1min) + Perception vs cog; success -> learn one: weakest attribute, weakest defense, or whether hp/F/I is over half spent

abilities.name: Steady Aim
abilities.eff: EONT: ranged weapon short+long ranges +50%; ranged hits deal bonus dmg = Perception ranks

abilities.name: Exploit Weakness
abilities.eff: use Gain Advantage as a faster action, only vs your quarry

abilities.name: Backstep
abilities.eff: after a ranged atk, 2F: Disengage as a free action; if your turn ends in cover/obscured -> gain Brace

abilities.name: Unrelenting Salvo
abilities.eff: your ranged weapon may Strike the same quarry repeatedly in a turn (ignores the 1-Strike-per-hand limit)

abilities.name: Hardy
abilities.eff: passive: +1 max hp per level, applied retroactively to all levels

abilities.name: Startling Blow
abilities.eff: unarmed/improvised atk vs cog of foe your size or smaller; hit or graze -> Surprised EONT

abilities.name: Killing Edge
abilities.eff: gain Knives+Slings expertises; while wielding a knife/sling it gains the Deadly + Quickdraw expert traits

abilities.name: Fatal Thrust
abilities.eff: light weapon melee atk vs cog of a Surprised/unaware/non-threatened foe; +4d4 dmg (6d4 t3, 8d4 t4, 10d4 t5); Discreet -> 2 adv; each max-value dmg die -> target -2 injury roll

abilities.name: Shadowing
abilities.eff: adv to avoid quarry's senses, quarry has disadv to sense you; succeeding vs spir while in cover/obscured + 3F -> make that target your quarry

abilities.name: Mighty
abilities.eff: passive: on weapon/unarmed hit, per action spent on the atk deal +1+tier dmg

abilities.name: Swift Strikes
abilities.eff: 1F: a second Strike with a hand already used to Strike this turn

abilities.name: Cold Eyes
abilities.eff: after killing/incapacitating your quarry: recover 1F + name a new sensed enemy as quarry

abilities.name: Sidestep
abilities.eff: gain an extra action at combat start + each turn, usable only to Dodge; disabled while wearing armor w/ deflect 2+

abilities.name: Deadly Trap
abilities.eff: conceal a 5ft trap (max = Survival ranks), triggers on touch, adv vs quarry, can't graze. Entangling: Survival vs cog, 2d4 impact + Immobilized 1rd + difficult terrain. Impaling: vs phys, 2d4 keen + Afflicted[3+Survival] 1rd, spend action -> injury

abilities.name: Experienced Trapper
abilities.eff: forage w/o focus on a short rest, auto-succeed foraging food/water (feeds = Survival ranks); craft tools via Survival; Deadly Trap dmg -> 2d6, condition duration -> 2rd

abilities.name: Animal Bond
abilities.eff: upgrade companion; while sensed within 10ft, +1 all defenses & it moves w/ you; spend action -> companion acts now (extra actions, fewer next turn). Track action -> sensed target becomes quarry

abilities.name: Protective Bond
abilities.eff: send companion to guard an ally within 30ft; while it stays in the ally's reach, ally gets your Animal Bond defense bonus instead of you; ends if recalled or scene ends

abilities.name: Feral Connection
abilities.eff: companion +5*tier max hp, +2 all defenses, +Survival ranks to its tests; gain Animal Care expertise

abilities.name: Surefooted
abilities.eff: passive: +10 movement; reduce falling/dangerous-terrain dmg by 2*tier

abilities.name: Hunter's Edge
abilities.eff: companion gains adv vs your quarry; Deadly Trap dmg -> 2d8, condition duration -> 3rd

abilities.name: Pack Hunting
abilities.eff: trigger: an ally with line of effect strikes your quarry -> 1F: add Survival ranks to their atk test or damage roll

abilities.name: Combat Coordination
abilities.eff: after a Strike -> trigger Decisive Command for free (no action); if the Strike missed, also skip its F cost

abilities.name: Valiant Intervention
abilities.eff: 1F: shift up to 10ft, then Athletics vs spir of an influenceable foe; success -> disadv on their tests vs your allies EONT; if they resist, you get adv vs them EONT

abilities.name: Imposing Posture
abilities.eff: when a foe within weapon reach resists your influence -> they become Disoriented EONT

abilities.name: Hardy
abilities.eff: passive: max & current HP +1 per level, applied retroactively to all levels

abilities.name: Mighty
abilities.eff: passive: on weapon/unarmed hit, per action-point spent on that atk -> +1+tier dmg

abilities.name: Resilient Hero
abilities.eff: 1/scene: just before dropping to 0 HP -> set HP to your Athletics mod instead

abilities.name: Resolute Stand
abilities.eff: Valiant Intervention: spend F up to Leadership ranks -> add that many extra targets; affected targets can't make Reactive Strikes vs your allies EONT

abilities.name: Demonstrative Command
abilities.eff: command die +1 size on gain; before an Athletics/Agility/Leadership test, 1F -> roll command die & add to your d20

abilities.name: Composed
abilities.eff: passive: max & current F +tier; rises with tier

abilities.name: Through the Fray
abilities.eff: pick an influenceable ally within 20ft -> before your turn ends they may Disengage or Gain Advantage as a free action

abilities.name: Well Supplied
abilities.eff: gain Military Logistics expertise; on a requisition/allocate-resources test, 2F -> add an Opportunity

abilities.name: Customary Garb
abilities.eff: passive: while visibly wearing Presentable armor/appropriate clothing, phys & spir defenses +2

abilities.name: Relentless March
abilities.eff: after Decisive Command on an ally: EONT their speed +10ft & they ignore Exhausted, Slowed, Surprised

abilities.name: Confident Command
abilities.eff: command die +1 size on gain; before an Intimidation/Leadership/Persuasion test, 1F -> roll command die & add to your d20

abilities.name: Synchronized Assault
abilities.eff: 2F: Leadership vs cog of a sensed foe; success -> up to Leadership-ranks allies, fail -> 1 ally; each gains a bonus Strike vs that foe (doesn't count vs their Strike limit) next turn

abilities.name: Authority
abilities.eff: passive: your ally-affecting Leader talents double their range & double max allies affected

abilities.name: Cutthroat Tactics
abilities.eff: when an ally would roll your command die, they may raise stakes instead; a Complication on it -> you regain 1F

abilities.name: Tactical Ploy
abilities.eff: Deception vs cog of an influenceable foe; success -> they lose 1F & take disadv on next cog/spir test; if they resist, you gain adv vs them EONT

abilities.name: Rumormonger
abilities.eff: gain Scandal expertise; on a test to spread misinformation/gather rumors, 2F -> add an Opportunity

abilities.name: Well Dressed
abilities.eff: gain Fashion expertise; while visibly in Presentable armor/fashionable clothing, adv on your first Deception/Leadership/Persuasion test each scene

abilities.name: Baleful
abilities.eff: passive: resisting your influence costs a character extra F equal to your tier

abilities.name: Set at Odds
abilities.eff: pick 2+ influenceable targets, spend that many F; Leadership vs highest spir among them -> success makes them mutually hostile until resolved; a resister loses extra F = Leadership ranks

abilities.name: Shrewd Command
abilities.eff: command die +1 size on gain; before a Deception/Insight/Leadership test, 1F -> roll command die & add to your d20

abilities.name: Grand Deception
abilities.eff: 3F: Deception DC15; success -> reveal that a plausible detail established since last scene's start was actually a ruse, changing it (GM adjudicates)

abilities.name: Efficient Engineer
abilities.eff: passive: gain a Crafting expertise (armor/equipment/weapon) + a free fabrial; crafting tests get +2 Opportunity range, raw-material cost halved

abilities.name: Prized Acquisition
abilities.eff: passive: gain Fabrial Crafting expertise + a cut gem; first craft w/ it skips the spren-attract/craft time (still needs materials); gem matches your tier, reusable

abilities.name: Deep Study
abilities.eff: passive: Erudition also grants +1 cultural/utility expertise and +2 non-surge cognitive skills; reassignable like the rest

abilities.name: Inventive Design
abilities.eff: passive: when crafting a fabrial w/ your Prized Acquisition gem, you may pick an effect 1 tier above the tier being crafted

abilities.name: Fine Handiwork
abilities.eff: passive: when crafting, an advanced feature costs 1 upgrade instead of 2; once per item

abilities.name: Overcharge
abilities.eff: 1/turn: on a fabrial atk test, raise stakes; spend -> free Strike w/ that fabrial (not counted vs Strike limit). GM may spend -> add a drawback until you pass DC15 Crafting

abilities.name: Experimental Tinkering
abilities.eff: passive: crafting gets +1 Opportunity range, time halved; on a long rest, reconfigure your Prized Acquisition fabrial into another of equal/lower tier (no materials/time; fail Lore -> keep old)

abilities.name: Overwhelm With Detail
abilities.eff: 2F: substitute your Lore modifier for the normal skill modifier on a cognitive or spiritual test

abilities.name: Strategize
abilities.eff: after you succeed at Gain Advantage w/ an Erudition skill, redirect that advantage to an influenceable ally; 2F -> the target can't use reactions vs that ally EONT

abilities.name: Mind and Body
abilities.eff: passive: Erudition grants +1 skill and may now pick non-surge physical skills; also gain 1 weapon expertise

abilities.name: Composed
abilities.eff: passive: max + current F rise by your tier; rises again each time tier increases

abilities.name: Know Your Moment
abilities.eff: passive: at each round's start, all your defenses +2 until your turn begins

abilities.name: Deep Contemplation
abilities.eff: swap as many as two of the skills/expertises Erudition gave you

abilities.name: Keen Insight
abilities.eff: after a successful Gain Advantage, the target takes disadv on its next test this encounter unless it shrugs off your sway

abilities.name: Contingency
abilities.eff: trigger: influenceable ally within 20ft rolls a Complication -> spend 2F to cancel a Complication on their test

abilities.name: Turning Point
abilities.eff: 1/scene, 2F: Deduction vs cog of the top enemy leader you can sense (adv if you went slow this turn); success -> you + influenceable allies gain an extra plot die on your next turns

abilities.name: Field Medicine
abilities.eff: 1F: DC15 Medicine to treat a willing conscious target in reach, roll their recovery die (disadv if self); success -> heal recovery die + Medicine ranks; fail -> recovery die only

abilities.name: Emotional Intelligence
abilities.eff: passive: Erudition grants +1 skill and may now pick non-surge spiritual skills; also gain Diagnosis utility expertise

abilities.name: Anatomical Insight
abilities.eff: on hitting a target your size or smaller w/ an unarmed atk, spend 1F or a plot die -> apply Exhausted, penalty = half your Medicine ranks (round up)

abilities.name: Collected
abilities.eff: passive: Cognitive and Spiritual defenses +2

abilities.name: Swift Healer
abilities.eff: passive: Field Medicine usable as a faster action; any health you restore to others gains +your Medicine ranks

abilities.name: Applied Medicine
abilities.eff: passive: whenever you make a character recover health, they recover +your Lore ranks extra

abilities.name: Ongoing Care
abilities.eff: spend a short/long rest treating an ally in reach -> DC10 Medicine (+5 per injury past the first); success removes 1 injury-caused condition (injury stays). 1/24h per target. Gain Mental Health Care expertise

abilities.name: Resuscitation
abilities.eff: use Field Medicine w/ 3F (not 1F) on a target in reach who is Unconscious or died within (Medicine ranks) rounds; DC +5 per extra injury; success heals + revives the dead, Unconscious may drop that condition

abilities.name: Feinting Strike
abilities.eff: melee weapon atk vs cog; hit -> foe loses 1 action + F equal to your Intimidation ranks; graze -> half F, no action loss; Opportunity -> action usable only to Strike/enter a stance

abilities.name: Flamestance
abilities.eff: stance: adv on Intimidation; if exactly 1 enemy in reach + no allies near it/you, free action -> gain action usable only to Gain Advantage or atk vs that enemy

abilities.name: Ironstance
abilities.eff: stance: adv on Insight; when a foe in reach misses or grazes you, Reactive Strike them as if they'd left your reach

abilities.name: Practiced Kata
abilities.eff: use stances in conversation/endeavor scenes too (entering/changing costs 1F + counts as a round contribution); if not Surprised at scene start, enter Vigilant Stance free

abilities.name: Signature Weapon
abilities.eff: gain 1 weapon expertise; pick a weapon type you're expert in -> its Opportunity range +1 (+2 at tier 3)

abilities.name: Surefooted
abilities.eff: passive: movement +10; reduce falling/dangerous-terrain damage by 2x tier

abilities.name: Vinestance
abilities.eff: stance: phys & cog defense +1; after hit/grazed in melee, reaction -> Athletics vs cog; success -> attacker loses 1d4 F + pushed up to 5ft x Athletics ranks

abilities.name: Wit's End
abilities.eff: move half movement, then melee weapon atk vs cog of a target with 0 F; ignores deflect, +4d6 dmg (6d6 t3, 8d6 t4, 10d6 t5), can't graze

abilities.name: Bloodstance
abilities.eff: stance: Opportunity range for atk & physical tests +2, but phys/cog/spir defenses -2

abilities.name: Meteoric Leap
abilities.eff: leap up to 1/4 movement, then unarmed atk vs phys of each chosen target in reach; double dmg dice; hit -> targets with lower Strength knocked Prone; adv in Shardplate

abilities.name: Mighty
abilities.eff: passive: on a weapon/unarmed hit, per action spent on that atk deal +1+tier dmg

abilities.name: Precise Parry
abilities.eff: before a melee hit lands, parry: unarmed -> Athletics (disadv unless vs Shardblade), Opportunity disarms; armed -> Weaponry test, a Shardblade can destroy a non-Invested weapon via Opportunity; DC = atk result, success -> hit becomes a graze

abilities.name: Shard Training
abilities.eff: 1/round a Shardblade Strike also grazes extra enemies (up to skill ranks used) in reach whose phys defense <= test result, free; gain Shardplate + Grandbow/Shardblade/Warhammer expertise; your Shardplate +2 charges

abilities.name: Shattering Blow
abilities.eff: on a melee hit while wielding two-handed or with a hand free, 2F -> target's charged armor loses 1 charge; each target that lost health pushed 5ft (+5ft per Strength above 5), impact damage vs a large object

abilities.name: Stonestance
abilities.eff: stance: deflect +1; a foe in reach must spend 1 extra action to hit allies of yours not also in Stonestance

abilities.name: Windstance
abilities.eff: stance: adv on Agility; while 2+ enemies in reach, free action -> gain action usable only to Disengage or atk those enemies

abilities.name: Cautious Advance
abilities.eff: move up to half speed (ignore difficult terrain), then gain an action only for Brace or Gain Advantage

abilities.name: Combat Training
abilities.eff: 1/round on a missed weapon atk, graze 1 target free; gain weapon + armor + Military Life cultural expertise

abilities.name: Defensive Position
abilities.eff: your Brace adds 2 disadv to atks vs you (not 1); while you Brace with a shield, allies within 5ft gain that cover/shield Brace too

abilities.name: Devastating Blow
abilities.eff: melee weapon atk vs phys, +2d8 dmg (3d8 t3, 4d8 t4, 5d8 t5)

abilities.name: Formation Drills
abilities.eff: an ally within 10ft who is Bracing also gets your Defensive Position effect

abilities.name: Hardy
abilities.eff: passive: max & current health +1 per level, applied retroactively to all levels

abilities.name: Swift Strikes
abilities.eff: 1F -> Strike again using a hand that already Struck this turn

abilities.name: Wary
abilities.eff: immune to Surprised whenever you hold 1+ F; when resisting influence or losing F involuntarily, cut the F lost by Discipline ranks (min 1)
